next_cycle_directives.bolt_p1: #557 [CRON-METRICS] lib/cron-metrics.ts — wrap requireCronSecret routes with duration + error counters via GA4 Measurement Protocol. Spec: new lib/cron-metrics.ts exporting wrapCronRoute(handler) that wraps the requireCronSecret-gated routes with start/end timers + try/catch error counters posted to existing GA4 measurement-protocol endpoint as custom events (cron_duration_ms, cron_error). Idempotent + zero-impact on success path. Migrate the 11 cron routes from C4907 #499 timing-safe migration to route through the wrapper. Closes the loop on cron silent-failure visibility post #499 timing-safe migration. tsc 0, eslint 0 expected.

Net effect: sold-PDP UX bundle now CLOSED (carousel + widget collapse + cross-sell scoring) and email triple (BackInStock + WishlistSold + SimilarItem) is now defended by 24h cross-pipeline dedup gate. Bolt's bandwidth opens for cron observability (#557 — closes the loop on #499 timing-safe migration with duration + error visibility) + e2e assertion cleanup (#558 — pins the #555 collapse). Trace MUST dispatch this cycle — Phase 7 sweep has now skipped two consecutive cycles (C4907 + C4908) and the audit-debt is growing across 5 fresh landings (#552/#553/#554/#555/#556). Sage cadence is slipping (0/cycle for two consecutive cycles, 3 templates left) — password-reset transactional re-prioritized P0 with explicit dispatch.
